violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager is no longer associated with this establishment.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop handle laying in flour.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need more thorough cleaning.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item - plastic wrap and pizz trays - was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Store 6" off the floor
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
